'''竏嗾h-r-dh''' ('''katharadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbethink|umbethink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbethink|umbethink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾h-r-dh
|-
! Lemma
| katharadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitharadh|thitharadh]] || [[word:jitharadh|jitharadh]] || [[word:shitharadh|shitharadh]] || [[word:kitharadh|kitharadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutharadh|thuthutharadh]] || [[word:jujutharadh|jujutharadh]] || [[word:shushutharadh|shushutharadh]] || [[word:kukutharadh|kukutharadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutharadh|thutharadh]] || [[word:jutharadh|jutharadh]] || [[word:shutharadh|shutharadh]] || [[word:kutharadh|kutharadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutharadh|thutharadh]] || [[word:jutharadh|jutharadh]] || [[word:shutharadh|shutharadh]] || [[word:kutharadh|kutharadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetharadh|thetharadh]] || [[word:jetharadh|jetharadh]] || [[word:shetharadh|shetharadh]] || [[word:ketharadh|ketharadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotharadh|thothotharadh]] || [[word:jojotharadh|jojotharadh]] || [[word:shoshotharadh|shoshotharadh]] || [[word:kokotharadh|kokotharadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotharadh|thotharadh]] || [[word:jotharadh|jotharadh]] || [[word:shotharadh|shotharadh]] || [[word:kotharadh|kotharadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotharadh|thotharadh]] || [[word:jotharadh|jotharadh]] || [[word:shotharadh|shotharadh]] || [[word:kotharadh|kotharadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtharadh|thﾃｦtharadh]] || [[word:jﾃｦtharadh|jﾃｦtharadh]] || [[word:shﾃｦtharadh|shﾃｦtharadh]] || [[word:kﾃｦtharadh|kﾃｦtharadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatharadh|thathatharadh]] || [[word:jajatharadh|jajatharadh]] || [[word:shashatharadh|shashatharadh]] || [[word:kakatharadh|kakatharadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatharadh|thatharadh]] || [[word:jatharadh|jatharadh]] || [[word:shatharadh|shatharadh]] || [[word:katharadh|katharadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatharadh|thatharadh]] || [[word:jatharadh|jatharadh]] || [[word:shatharadh|shatharadh]] || [[word:katharadh|katharadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatharadh|shatharadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatharadh|goshatharadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatharadh|gokishatharadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatharadhnﾃｼ|shatharadhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatharadhnknﾃｼ|goshatharadhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharadhnﾃｼ|gokishatharadhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatharadhshﾃｫ|shatharadhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkshﾃｫ|goshatharadhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatharadhshﾃｫ|gokishatharadhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharadhro|shatharadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkro|goshatharadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharadhro|gokishatharadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharadhmu|shatharadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkmu|goshatharadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharadhmu|gokishatharadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatharadhsher|shatharadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatharadhnksher|goshatharadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatharadhsher|gokishatharadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatharadhng|shatharadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkng|goshatharadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatharadhng|gokishatharadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatharadhya|shatharadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkya|goshatharadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatharadhya|gokishatharadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatharadhyam|shatharadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkyam|goshatharadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatharadhyam|gokishatharadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shatharadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharadhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshatharadhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishatharadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharadhnﾃｼro|shatharadhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharadhnknﾃｼro|goshatharadhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharadhnﾃｼro|gokishatharadhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharadhnﾃｼmu|shatharadhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharadhnknﾃｼmu|goshatharadhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharadhnﾃｼmu|gokishatharadhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shatharadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshatharadhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishatharadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharadhshﾃｫro|shatharadhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkshﾃｫro|goshatharadhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharadhshﾃｫro|gokishatharadhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharadhshﾃｫmu|shatharadhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkshﾃｫmu|goshatharadhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharadhshﾃｫmu|gokishatharadhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharadhronﾃｼ|shatharadhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkronﾃｼ|goshatharadhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharadhronﾃｼ|gokishatharadhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharadhroshﾃｫ|shatharadhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkroshﾃｫ|goshatharadhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharadhroshﾃｫ|gokishatharadhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharadhromu|shatharadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkromu|goshatharadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharadhromu|gokishatharadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharadhmunﾃｼ|shatharadhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkmunﾃｼ|goshatharadhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharadhmunﾃｼ|gokishatharadhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharadhmushﾃｫ|shatharadhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkmushﾃｫ|goshatharadhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharadhmushﾃｫ|gokishatharadhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharadhmuro|shatharadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharadhnkmuro|goshatharadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharadhmuro|gokishatharadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
